bannerTwo.desc: Delivered within 1 hour! A wide range of food and daily necessities are waiting for you to choose!

payment.title: Payment
payment.redirecting: We are redirecting you to the payment page. Please wait patiently.

card.bankNameFull: (Full Name: Joint Stock Commercial Bank for Foreign Trade of Vietnam)

paymentSubmit.title: Operation Completed
paymentSubmit.description:
Hello, your order has been submitted and payment has been completed. We will arrange delivery of your product after confirming your payment.
Please check the [Carrefour] order details page for delivery progress.
paymentSubmit.checkOrderDetail: Please check the [Carrefour] order details page for delivery progress.

bankTransfer.minimumAmount: Minimum 10 EUR for bank transfer submission.
bankTransfer.amountOnlineHint: You can enter the amount in the top-up flow.
bankTransfer.onlineHint: Use the next step to top up with your saved cards or other online methods.
bankTransfer.referenceHint: Include in the payment reference: {{reference}} (your registered email and/or user ID).
noticeItems: Please transfer only from an account under your own name.
Include your account ID or registered email in the payment reference.
Deposits are typically credited within 1–3 business days after receipt.
After completing the transfer, please upload your payment receipt for faster processing.
ctaSteps: Enter the amount you wish to deposit.
Transfer the funds using the bank details above.
Use your account email or user ID as the payment reference.
bankTransfer.balanceNote: Your balance will be updated once the transfer is verified.
bankTransfer.uploadReceipt: Upload transfer receipt (JPG or PNG, max 2 MB)
bankTransfer.loginRequired: Please log in to submit a deposit request.
bankTransfer.submitSuccess: Request submitted. We will review your deposit shortly.
bankTransfer.submitError: Could not submit your request. Please try again.

address.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

paymentResult.successExpired: You have completed the payment, This checkout session has expired!
paymentResult.successDescription: Thank you for your purchase! We have received your order.
paymentResult.cancelExpired: You have cancelled the payment, This checkout session has expired!
paymentResult.cancelDescription: Your payment has been cancelled. If you have any questions, please contact customer service.
paymentResult.invalidDescription: This payment link is invalid, this checkout session has expired!
